title: 7 Best Moosend Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare the top Moosend alternatives. Find the best email marketing tool for your business with free trials and pricing.
h1: Best Moosend Alternatives: Compare Top Email Marketing Tools
intro: While Moosend offers excellent value with unlimited emails and a generous free tier, you might be looking for alternatives that specialize in specific features, industries, or use cases. Whether you need advanced CRM capabilities, better creator-focused tools, or superior customer support, there's a perfect email marketing platform for your needs.
why_switch: Specialized tools designed for your industry (e-commerce, creators, newsletters)
Advanced features like predictive analytics, SMS, or integrated CRM
Better customer support and platform reliability ratings

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: Small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite matches Moosend's $9 starting price with a cleaner drag-drop editor and includes pop-ups and surveys out of the box. It has slightly better Trustpilot ratings (4.5 vs 4.4) and an equally generous free tier supporting 1,000 subscribers.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv is purpose-built for newsletter creators with native monetization, an ad network, and referral programs integrated. It offers a more generous free tier (2,500 subscribers) and matches Moosend's high ratings (4.7 on G2, 4.4 on Trustpilot).

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit specializes in creator economics with built-in landing pages, commerce features, and subscriber tagging designed for audiences. The free tier supports 1,000 subscribers, making it ideal for growing creators before upgrading.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: Businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and site tracking in one platform. While it requires a paid plan from $15, it's the better choice for businesses outgrowing email-only tools.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptionally generous free tier (100,000 subscribers) plus SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat capabilities. It's perfect if you need multi-channel communication beyond email marketing.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is the most established alternative (founded 2001) with excellent beginner-friendly features and wide integrations. Despite lower Trustpilot ratings, it remains the most recognizable choice for small business email marketing.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: Online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely combines email with native webinar hosting and online course capabilities, making it ideal for educators. Starting at $19/month with automation and conversion funnel tools, it serves course creators better than Moosend.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with up to 100,000 subscribers and includes email, SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. If you prefer a dedicated email platform, MailerLite and ConvertKit both offer free tiers for 1,000 subscribers with excellent feature sets comparable to Moosend's free plan.

faq.q: What is the best Moosend alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the strongest alternative for small businesses, matching Moosend's $9 starting price while offering better overall ratings and a polished user experience. It includes landing pages, pop-ups, and automation workflows that small businesses need to grow without complexity.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo and Mailchimp both offer completely free plans with no time limits, making them technically cheaper if you stay within their free tiers. For paid plans, MailerLite matches Moosend at $9/month, while Brevo's paid plans start at $25/month with significantly more features like SMS and WhatsApp.
